title: The Secret of Treasure Island
writer: L. Ron Hubbard, George M. Merrick, George Rosener
actors: Don Terry, Gwen Gaze, Walter Miller
plot: In the Prologue, pirates hide a treasure on an island off the Mexican coast. And the pirates, the map and the treasure disappear in a volcanic eruption. The legend of the island draws treasure seekers for a few centuries, but the ...
